summary: Verified kie.ai integration: Settings test-connection shows credits (49.96), Motion Control page fully functional with all 5 sections, provider toggle works correctly. Fixed 2 bugs: kling-status null data handling and upload-file endpoint path.

minor.issue: Returns 'Credits insufficient' when using 1080p mode - expected behavior due to low credits balance

issues: Console warning: No routes matched location '/stories' - may need to check router config

critical_code_review_comments: Settings test-connection correctly calls kie.ai credit endpoint and displays balance
Motion Control page properly integrated with kie.ai backend endpoints
Upload-file endpoint now uses correct kie.ai file-stream-upload URL
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (lines 841-844: fixed null data handling in kling-status, lines 864-893: fixed upload-file endpoint)

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/14 tests passed - 1 expected failure due to credits)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, all interactions work)

context_for_next_testing_agent: kie.ai integration fully working. Settings page shows credits balance on test. Motion Control page uses Kling 2.6 via kie.ai. All backend endpoints verified: test-connection, kling-motion, kling-status, upload-file, generate-text. Account has ~49.96 credits remaining.

settings_page: When kie.ai selected: shows Gemini 2.5 Flash, GPT-Image-1, Veo 3 Fast models - PASS
